nasb.text: For, in the first place, when you come together as a church, I hear that divisions exist among you; and in part I believe it.

esv.text: For, in the first place, when you come together as a church, I hear that there are divisions among you. And I believe it in part,

cnv.text: 首先，我聽說你們在聚會的時候，你們中間起了分裂，這話我也稍微相信。

ccb.text: 首先，我听说你们在聚会的时候拉帮结派，我相信这些话有几分真实。

csbs.text: 首先，我听说你们做为一个教会聚集的时候，在你们中间有分裂，我也部分地相信这话。
